name: ai-provider-watch
description: Read AI-provider change events, check downstream repo impact, and review APW source/data changes.

interface.shortDescription: Read provider-change events and repo impact
interface.longDescription: AI Provider Watch helps Codex consume reviewed AI-provider change events, inspect downstream provider/model references, review source candidates, and prepare APW releases through deterministic local CLI and read-only MCP surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Check this repo for AI provider changes
Explain the latest APW provider events
